title: rhabdodendraceae
intro: The Rhabdodendraceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It consists of a group of plants that share similar characteristics and evolutionary relationships, and is typically denoted by the suffix "-aceae" in their botanical names. Rhabdodendraceae is a small family of plants, primarily found in tropical regions. This family includes various species of shrubs and trees that exhibit unique adaptations to their environments.
